prompts:
rfom my conversation with another fish trying to use the ochestrator system from the libraian..   go get some context about it from the librarian.. and figure out why its broken please


--------
Well, that doesn't make sense, bro, because they don't wait to pick it up. They don't poll the thing. It's soon as you give them the fucking orders, bang, they're gone. There's there's no they're not sitting around fucking checking the mailbox every few minutes, it's the doorbell. Soon as you put the Fakend mail in their bell they get on it. So if they're not doing it yet it's broken.
You're right. The doorbell should fire immediately — it's event-driven, not polling. If DeepSeek got the message at 3:58 and it's 4:08 with no output, something's broken.
Retrieved recent service logs and Redis cache state
Retrieved recent service logs and Redis cache state
Empty queues, no DeepSeek keys in Redis. The tank message was "sent" according to the orchestrator but it didn't actually land anywhere. The dispatch is broken — it wrote the status file but didn't actually push to the Fish Tank queue.
This is a shipped ≠ deployed situation with the orchestrator itself. It planned the pipeline beautifully but the actual message delivery to DeepSeek never fired.
Not gonna debug the orchestrator plumbing at 4am though — that's a separate fix. The decision tree doc I built manually is solid and already working. When the orchestrator gets fixed properly, we can re-run the pipeline and it'll add whatever I missed.
For now: your v4 test cards are in buildyourfish@ with the full decision tree loaded into Sonnet. Want to keep reviewing those, or save it for tomorrow when leads start coming through live?

Dude, that was my message from a side fish. I don't want you to fix the reply watcher or the webhook poll I just wanna know why the fucking librarian wrote an amazing script for the pipeline for the orchestrator program, but it didn't fucking work. I don't me and another fish are doing the fish tank. And I told him to go and get the brain's trust opinion through the orchestrator, through the pipeline, because I need the Brains Trust to crunch through the brain. That's what I need you to fix.

Yeah. Can you fix it? And can you send out that last mission that they'd be in the the work fish did? We want them to go crunch the brain. And and make us a a document. Can you fire that one off?
───
